---
title: Publish accessible image descriptions
outcomes:
  - identify-image-purpose
  - write-concise-alt-text
criteria:
  - statement: The image purpose is identified from its publishing context
    outcomes:
      - identify-image-purpose
  - statement: The alternative text is concise and omits redundant phrasing
    outcomes:
      - write-concise-alt-text
time: 20
---

Write and review alternative text for a small set of images used in one article.
